name: No-Bake Cocoa Haystacks
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, butter, milk, and cocoa.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until the mixture reaches a full boil.
3. Remove from heat and stir in the remaining ingredients.
4. Drop the mixture by rounded teaspoonfuls onto wax paper.
5. Allow to cool completely.
6. Store in a cool, dry place.
